member.name: P:GTA.Ped.BlockPermanentEvents
member.summary:
Sets whether permanent events are blocked for this
.
If set to
, this
will no longer react to permanent events and will only do as they're told. For example, the
will not flee when get shot at and they will not begin combat even if the decision maker specifies that seeing a hated ped should. However, the
will still respond to temporary events like walking around other peds or vehicles even if this property is set to
.
member.value:
if permanent events are blocked; otherwise,
.
